job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst with Population Health
Company: People Force Consulting Inc
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/eeda7e98-531e-4e24-bec2-915f1b1b9025

- Remote healthcare analyst role with SQL and dashboards.
- Focus on large-scale data analysis, insights, and validation.
strengths: Large-scale healthcare analytics and SQL fit

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Large-Scale Analytics | Dashboard Support
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience analyzing, validating, and reconciling large-scale healthcare data across claims, member, provider, and reporting workflows. Strong hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, data quality, and cross-functional support for dashboards, analytics, and stakeholder-facing insights.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), dashboard quality assurance
replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)

replacements.replace: Partnered with cross-functional teams of 12+ across Agile sprints to clarify requirements, validate outputs, and support stakeholder-ready analytics and reporting deliverables.
replacements.find: Partnered with cross-functional teams of 12+ (Business Analysts, QA, Data Engineers, downstream report owners) across 2-week Agile sprints; managed 150+ JIRA defects through triage, clarification, validation, and closure.

gaps: Population health domain is adjacent rather than direct
notes: Tailored toward SQL analytics, dashboards, and large-scale healthcare data accuracy.
job_title: Healthcare Data Analyst with Population Health
